name: query-graph-api-recon
bodyMarkdown:
# Graph API Reconnaissance Burst Detection Query

**Category:** Detection Chokepoints | **Maturity:** Hunt | **FP Rate:** Medium
**Techniques:** T1087.004, T1069.003 | **Log Sources:** Microsoft Graph Activity Logs

```kql
MicrosoftGraphActivityLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| extend EndpointCategory = case(
    Resource has "roleManagement" or Resource has "directoryRole", "role-discovery",
    Resource has "tenantRelationships", "cross-tenant",
    Resource has "mailboxSettings" or Resource has "messages", "mailbox",
    Resource has "contactFolders" or Resource has "contacts", "contacts",
    Resource has "subscribedSkus" or Resource has "organization", "org-licensing",
    "other"
  )
| summarize EndpointCategories = dcount(EndpointCategory), TotalCalls = count(), DistinctEndpoints = dcount(Resource) by UserPrincipalName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1m)
| where EndpointCategories >= 4
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, EndpointCategories, TotalCalls, DistinctEndpoints
| sort by TotalCalls desc
```
